message:
fix(fr-command): SRANDMEMBER/ZRANDMEMBER trailing-args emit syntax error [bd-frankenredis-8abz]

Upstream commands.def declares both SRANDMEMBER and ZRANDMEMBER
with arity = -2. Any trailing argument after the [count
WITHSCORES] / [count WITHVALUES] options lands in the handler's
syntaxerr branch, not the table-level arity check.

fr-command capped argv.len() with WrongArity, producing 'ERR
wrong number of arguments for srandmember command' for cases like
SRANDMEMBER s 1 extra. Switch to SyntaxError for the > 3 (SRAND)
/ > 4 (ZRAND) tail. HRANDFIELD already uses the correct branch.

Existing 'no key' WrongArity branch is unchanged.
